title: Creating composites of multiple articles
source: support.dish.co official article (Creating composites of multiple articles)

steps.caption: Using product composites you can link multiple products to one main product. This is useful for arrangements or package deals (for example a children's party of bowling plus a bowl of fries).
In the upper right hand corner of the products overview, click Add product to create the package product.
Give the product a name, for example Children's party, and link it to the correct product group such as Arrangements or Package deals.
You can leave the price at 0. The components you add will determine the total price of the package.
Scroll down to the Composites section. This is where you add the products that make up the package.

Under Composites click Add component and search for each item to add, such as Bowling and a bowl of French fries. The total price updates automatically. You can also tick Prepare composite products separately to print each component at its own production station.
Click Save. The arrangement is created and will appear in the article list as a single product.
